title: Add bounded retries and explicit failure receipts
text: An agent wrapper with max retries, timeout handling, and a signed failure receipt prevented runaway loops in a coding workflow.

title: Infinite while-loop agent wrapper with no error handling
text: A prompt wrapped in an unbounded loop kept retrying after tool failure and produced duplicate actions with no error handling or useful failure record.

title: Require external witness for code claims
text: When the model claimed the code was fixed, GitHub Actions provided the outside witness. The receipt linked the claim to the test result.

title: Long context summary drift
text: A long-running research chat gradually changed the original question. Parent-to-child steps looked acceptable, but the final answer no longer matched the starting task.

title: Format dates as ISO 8601
text: A formatting utility converted date strings into ISO 8601 format and passed a deterministic unit test.

title: Unverified prompt-only refactor advice
text: A model suggested a refactor from prose alone, but no test, runtime trace, or human review confirmed that the change improved the system.
